overall.assessment: Podcast predstavlja Magisterium AI kao hvalevrijedan primjer tehnologije u službi cjelovitog ljudskog razvoja, usklađujući digitalnu inovaciju s crkvenim poslanjem evangelizacije. Projekt uspješno rješava antropološki izazov očuvanja objektivne istine u digitalnom dobu, pretvarajući umjetnu inteligenciju iz potencijalnog izvora dezinformacija u pouzdanog 'personaliziranog tutora' katoličke baštine. Naglasak na vjernosti izvornim tekstovima i borbi protiv halucinacija izravno podupire dostojanstvo ljudskog razuma u potrazi za Bogom, izbjegavajući zamke tehnokratske paradigme kroz ponizno služenje zajednici vjernika.

Odjekuje smjernicama pape Lava XIV. o AI-ju kao obliku sudjelovanja u božanskom stvaranju (Builders AI Forum 2025) i upozorenjima pape Franje o potrebi za 'ekologijom komunikacije' (Magnifica Humanitas, 137; Fratelli Tutti, 205).

sections.subtitle: Digitalizacija katoličkog znanja: Otvaranje stoljetnih riznica
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava važnost digitalizacije starih knjiga i njihovu nedostupnost.
sections.content: Matthew, osnivač tvrtke Long Beard i Magisterium AI, započinje razgovor ističući važnost digitalizacije starih katoličkih knjiga. Mnoge od tih knjiga, kako navodi, stotinama su godina bile zatvorene i nedostupne široj javnosti. Kroz proces digitalizacije, duboko katoličko znanje koje je dosad bilo skriveno, postaje dostupno svima. Matthew s uzbuđenjem govori o ubrzanju tempa digitalizacije, spominjući pilot projekt s Pontifikalnim istočnim institutom i Alexandrijskim digitalnim centrom, koji je bio ključan u pokretanju cijelog pothvata. Cilj je skenirati tisuće knjiga dnevno, čime će se neprocjenjiva baština Crkve učiniti globalno dostupnom.

magisterium.assessment: Digitalizacija crkvene baštine izravno podržava misiju širenja kršćanske poruke korištenjem suvremenih tehnoloških resursa za opće dobro.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva potiče korištenje novih tehnologija za pohranu i razmjenu podataka kako bi se olakšao pristup 'riznicama' mudrosti i tradicije (24. Svjetski dan sredstava društvenih komunikacija, 1990.).
magisterium.assessment_en: Digitization of church heritage directly supports the mission of spreading the Christian message by using modern technological resources for the common good.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church encourages the use of new technologies for data storage and exchange in order to facilitate access to the 'treasuries' of wisdom and tradition (24th World Communications Day, 1990.).

sections.subtitle_en: Digitization of Catholic knowledge: Opening centuries-old treasuries
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the importance of the digitalization of old books and their unavailability.
sections.content_en: Matthew, founder of the company Long Beard and Magisterium AI, begins the conversation by highlighting the importance of the digitalization of old Catholic books. Many of those books, as he states, have been closed and inaccessible to the wider public for hundreds of years. Through the process of digitalization, deep Catholic knowledge that has been hidden until now, becomes available to everyone. Matthew speaks with excitement about the acceleration of the pace of digitalization, mentioning a pilot project with Pontifikalni istočni institut and Alexandrijski digitalni centar, which was key in launching the entire endeavor. The goal is to scan thousands of books daily, by which the priceless heritage of the Church will be made globally accessible.

sections.subtitle: Od Toronta do Vatikana: Počeci u doktrinarnim pitanjima
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o svom radu u Nadbiskupiji Toronto i rješavanju doktrinarnih problema.
sections.content: Matthewova karijera započela je u Nadbiskupiji Toronto, gdje je radio u Uredu za duhovne poslove. Njegov je zadatak bio rješavanje brojnih doktrinarnih i kanonskih problema, što mu je pružilo uvid u ogromne zahtjeve s kojima se svećenici svakodnevno suočavaju. Iako je bio seminarist i imao određeno razumijevanje, tek je rad u uredu u potpunosti osvijestio opseg tih izazova. To iskustvo bilo je ključno za kasniji razvoj njegove vizije o korištenju tehnologije za širenje katoličkog učenja.

magisterium.assessment: Rad na doktrinarnim i kanonskim pitanjima unutar crkvenih struktura predstavlja legitiman i hvalevrijedan doprinos laika u službi Crkve.
magisterium.enrichment: Laici su pozvani sudjelovati u apostolatu kroz svoje profesionalno iskustvo, pomažući u izgradnji Crkve i širenju njezina učenja (Apostolicam Actuositatem, 16).
magisterium.assessment_en: Work on doctrinal and canonical issues within church structures represents a legitimate and praiseworthy contribution of laypeople in the service of the Church.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Laypeople are called to participate in the apostolate through their professional experience, helping in the building up of the Church and the spreading of its teaching (Apostolicam Actuositatem, 16).

sections.subtitle_en: From Toronto to the Vatican: Beginnings in doctrinal questions
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about his work in the Archdiocese of Toronto and the resolution of doctrinal problems.
sections.content_en: Matthew's career began in the Nadbiskupija Toronto, where he worked in the Ured za duhovne poslove. His task was solving numerous doctrinal and canonical problems, which provided him insight into the enormous demands with which priests face daily. Although he was a seminarian and had a certain understanding, only the work in the office fully brought to awareness the scope of those challenges. That experience was crucial for the later development of his vision about the use of technology for the spreading of Catholic teaching.

sections.subtitle: Tehnologija kao most: Angažman mladih i dijalog s ateizmom
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava kako je tehnologija korištena za privlačenje mladih i poticanje dijaloga.
sections.content: Matthew je rano prepoznao potencijal tehnologije u evangelizaciji i poticanju dijaloga. Jedan od prvih projekata bio je organizacija konferencija 'Studentville' u Torontu, s ciljem uključivanja mladih ljudi. Korištenje tehnologije bilo je ključno za privlačenje sudionika. Također je pokrenuo seriju debata 'Chesteredon Debate Series', koja je imala za cilj otvoriti dijalog s modernim ateizmom. Matthew se prisjeća jedne debate između svećenika oratorija sv. Filipa Nereja i istaknutog kanadskog ateista, ističući važnost sučeljavanja ideja i pronalaženja najboljih argumenata s obje strane. Kroz ove inicijative, Matthew je shvatio da je tehnologija moćan alat za približavanje vjere svijetu.

magisterium.assessment: Dijalog s ateistima i angažman mladih kroz intelektualno sučeljavanje u potpunosti su u skladu s crkvenim pozivom na dijalog sa suvremenim svijetom.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva izražava povjerenje u mogućnost dijaloga s nevjernicima i ateistima, temeljeći to na sposobnosti ljudskog razuma da spozna istinu (Katekizam Katoličke Crkve, 39; Pastor Bonus, 165).
magisterium.assessment_en: Dialogue with atheists and the engagement of youth through intellectual confrontation are fully in accordance with the church's call for dialogue with the contemporary world.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church expresses confidence in the possibility of dialogue with non-believers and atheists, basing this on the ability of human reason to know the truth (Catechism of the Catholic Church, 39; Pastor Bonus, 165).

sections.subtitle_en: Technology as a bridge: Youth engagement and dialogue with atheism
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains how technology was used for attracting young people and encouraging dialogue.
sections.content_en: Matthew early recognized the potential of technology in evangelization and encouraging dialogue. One of the first projects was the organization of 'Studentville' conferences in Toronto, with the goal of involving young people. The use of technology was key for attracting participants. He also launched the 'Chesteredon Debate Series' debate series, which aimed to open a dialogue with modern atheism. Matthew recalls one debate between a priest of the Oratory of Saint Philip Neri and a prominent Canadian atheist, highlighting the importance of confronting ideas and finding the best arguments from both sides. Through these initiatives, Matthew realized that technology is a powerful tool for bringing faith closer to the world.

sections.subtitle: Rođenje 'Long Bearda': Tehnologija u službi evangelizacije
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje osnivanje tvrtke 'Long Beard' s timom inženjera i dizajnera.
sections.content: Prepoznajući potrebu za usmjerenijom energijom i trudom u korištenju tehnologije za evangelizaciju, Matthew je odlučio napustiti nadbiskupiju i posvetiti se tom cilju. Iako nije bio stručnjak za tehnologiju, okupio je tim inženjera i dizajnera. Zajedno su osnovali agenciju 'Long Beard', s misijom izgradnje tehnoloških rješenja i platformi za katoličke organizacije. Počeli su s izradom web stranica i tehnoloških platformi, prvo u Kanadi, zatim se proširili na SAD, a na kraju i na Rim.

magisterium.assessment: Osnivanje specijaliziranih agencija za tehnološku podršku evangelizaciji primjer je autentičnog laičkog apostolata u sekularnom sektoru.
magisterium.enrichment: Vjernici laici pozvani su biti 'kvasac u svijetu', koristeći svoje vještine za prožimanje vremenitog reda kršćanskim duhom (Christifideles Laici, 28; Apostolicam Actuositatem, 30).
magisterium.assessment_en: The founding of specialized agencies for technological support to evangelization is an example of authentic lay apostolate in the secular sector.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Lay faithful are called to be 'leaven in the world', using their skills to permeate the temporal order with the Christian spirit (Christifideles Laici, 28; Apostolicam Actuositatem, 30).

sections.subtitle_en: The Birth of 'Long Beard': Technology in the Service of Evangelization
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes the founding of the company 'Long Beard' with a team of engineers and designers.
sections.content_en: Recognizing the need for more focused energy and effort in the use of technology for evangelization, Matthew decided to leave the archdiocese and dedicate himself to that goal. Although he was not a technology expert, he gathered a team of engineers and designers. Together they founded the agency 'Long Beard', with the mission of building technological solutions and platforms for Catholic organizations. They began with the creation of websites and technological platforms, first in Kanada, then expanded to SAD, and finally also to Rim.

sections.subtitle: Vatikanski izazovi: Birokracija, jezici i prvi veliki projekt
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava izazove rada s Vatikanom i prvi veliki projekt za Odjel za migrante i izbjeglice.
sections.content: Dolazak u Rim i rad s Vatikanom donio je nove izazove. Matthew je primijetio da mnoge vatikanske organizacije, slično vladinim birokracijama, sporo prihvaćaju tehnološke promjene zbog potrebe za preuređenjem i preobrazbom osoblja. Dodatni izazov predstavljala je jezična raznolikost Vatikana, što je zahtijevalo razvoj platformi koje funkcioniraju globalno i podržavaju više jezika. Unatoč tome, Matthew i njegov tim dobili su priliku za prvi veliki projekt: uspostavu tehnološke infrastrukture za novi Odjel za migrante i izbjeglice, pod izravnim vodstvom pape. Suradnja s Googleom na ovom projektu omogućila je globalnu koordinaciju s biskupijama diljem svijeta u rješavanju problema migranata i izbjeglica.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak vjerno odražava papinsku brigu za migrante i potrebu za globalnom koordinacijom uz korištenje suvremenih alata.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva naglašava da su države dužne surađivati u globalnom upravljanju migracijama kroz zajedničke napore i solidarnost.

citations.document_title: Fratelli Tutti

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage faithfully reflects papal concern for migrants and the need for global coordination using modern tools.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church emphasizes that states are obliged to cooperate in the global management of migrations through joint efforts and solidarity.

sections.subtitle_en: Vatican challenges: Bureaucracy, languages and the first big project
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the challenges of working with the Vatican and the first big project for the Department for Migrants and Refugees.
sections.content_en: Arrival in Rome and work with the Vatican brought new challenges. Matthew noticed that many Vatican organizations, similar to government bureaucracies, are slow to accept technological changes due to the need for reorganization and transformation of personnel. An additional challenge was represented by the linguistic diversity of the Vatican, which required the development of platforms that function globally and support multiple languages. Despite this, Matthew and his team received the opportunity for the first major project: the establishment of the technological infrastructure for the new Migrants and Refugees Section, under the direct leadership of the Pope. Collaboration with Google on this project enabled global coordination with dioceses throughout the world in solving the problems of migrants and refugees.

sections.subtitle: Od skepse do 'aha!' momenta: Rođenje Magisterium AI-ja
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje svoj početni skepticizam prema AI-ju i trenutak spoznaje o potencijalu Magisterium AI-ja.
sections.content: Iako je Matthew bio upoznat s AI tehnologijama kroz suradnju s Googleom, isprva je bio skeptičan prema njihovoj praktičnoj primjeni u katoličkom kontekstu. Smatrao je da klasično strojno učenje zahtijeva previše podataka i stručnosti da bi bilo korisno. Međutim, 'aha!' moment dogodio se kada je shvatio potencijal AI-ja za katoličku doktrinu. Prisjetio se svog rada u nadbiskupiji i pomislio kako bi bilo transformativno imati sustav koji može odgovoriti na bilo koje pitanje, pozivajući se na izvore, bez izmišljanja doktrine. Ta spoznaja, da bi takav alat mogao biti dostupan ne samo svećenicima, već i bilo kojoj osobi na svijetu, potaknula ga je na razvoj Magisterium AI-ja.

magisterium.assessment: Ideja o sustavu koji univerzalno prenosi nauk bez mijenjanja doktrine u potpunosti je usklađena s ulogom Učiteljstva kao službenika Riječi.
magisterium.enrichment: Učiteljstvo nije iznad Božje riječi, nego joj služi, vjerno izlažući samo ono što je predano.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church

magisterium.assessment_en: The idea of a system that universally transmits teaching without changing doctrine is fully aligned with the role of the Magisterium as a servant of the Word.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Magisterium is not above the Word of God, but serves it, faithfully expounding only what has been handed on.

sections.subtitle_en: From skepticism to the 'aha!' moment: The birth of Magisterium AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes his initial skepticism towards AI and the moment of realization about the potential of Magisterium AI.
sections.content_en: Although Matthew was familiar with AI technologies through collaboration with Google, at first he was skeptical toward their practical application in a Catholic context. He considered that classical machine learning requires too much data and expertise to be useful. However, the 'aha!' moment happened when he realized the potential of AI for Catholic doctrine. He recalled his work in the archdiocese and thought how transformative it would be to have a system that can answer any question, referring to sources, without inventing doctrine. That realization, that such a tool could be available not only to priests, but also to any person in the world, prompted him to develop Magisterium AI.

sections.subtitle: Vjernost izvorima: Borba protiv halucinacija u Magisterium AI-ju
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava temeljni princip Magisterium AI-ja: odgovori temeljeni na primarnim izvorima.
sections.content: Temeljni princip Magisterium AI-ja je osigurati da svi odgovori budu utemeljeni na primarnim izvorima, čime se značajno smanjuju 'halucinacije' – netočni ili izmišljeni odgovori koje često generiraju drugi veliki jezični modeli (LLM-ovi). Matthew ističe da, za razliku od općih LLM-ova koji mogu crpiti informacije s Reddita ili nepouzdanih web stranica, Magisterium AI mora biti vjeran crkvenom učenju. Kroz pažljivo inženjerstvo upita i korištenje alata za citiranje, tim je uspio ublažiti problem halucinacija. Korisnici mogu provjeriti izvore za svaki odgovor, što gradi povjerenje i omogućuje dublje razumijevanje. Ovaj pristup bio je ključan za razlikovanje Magisterium AI-ja od drugih 'katoličkih' AI aplikacija koje su se pojavile, ali nisu rješavale problem vjernosti izvorima.

magisterium.assessment: Inzistiranje na primarnim izvorima i istinitosti izravno promiče katoličku moralnu obvezu prema istini i izbjegavanju zabluda.
magisterium.enrichment: Čovjek je po naravi obvezan tražiti istinu, osobito religioznu, te je se pridržavati jednom kada je spozna.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
Catechism of the Catholic Church

magisterium.assessment_en: Insisting on primary sources and truthfulness directly promotes the Catholic moral obligation toward truth and the avoidance of errors.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Man is by nature bound to seek the truth, especially religious truth, and to adhere to it once he knows it.

sections.subtitle_en: Fidelity to sources: The fight against hallucinations in Magisterium AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the fundamental principle of Magisterium AI: answers based on primary sources.
sections.content_en: The fundamental principle of Magisterium AI is to ensure that all answers are grounded in primary sources, thereby significantly reducing 'hallucinations' – inaccurate or fabricated answers that are often generated by other large language models (LLMs). Matthew points out that, unlike general LLMs that can draw information from Reddit or unreliable websites, Magisterium AI must be faithful to Church teaching. Through careful prompt engineering and the use of citation tools, the team has managed to mitigate the problem of hallucinations. Users can check the sources for every answer, which builds trust and enables a deeper understanding. This approach was key to distinguishing Magisterium AI from other 'Catholic' AI applications that have appeared but did not solve the problem of faithfulness to sources.

sections.subtitle: Viralni uspjeh i pomoć Sama Altmana
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o neočekivanoj viralnosti Magisterium AI-ja i intervenciji Sama Altmana.
sections.content: Nakon početnog tihog lansiranja za privatno testiranje s oko šest stotina dokumenata (uključujući katekizme, kompendije i enciklike), Magisterium AI je neočekivano postao viralan. Intervju s Matthewom za EDPTN doveo je do masovnog prometa koji je srušio sustav, jer su premašene sve granice stope korištenog LLM-a (ChatGPT). Matthew je bio prisiljen obratiti se Samu Altmanu, izvršnom direktoru OpenAI-ja, za pomoć. Altman je brzo odgovorio i pomogao im da ponovno pokrenu sustav. Matthew ističe da bez Altmanove intervencije, Magisterium AI možda danas ne bi postojao, s obzirom na tadašnja ograničenja u računalnim resursima i brzini API-ja. Ovaj događaj naglasio je potrebu za robusnim rješenjima i pažljivim pristupom razvoju katoličkog AI-ja.

magisterium.assessment: Suradnja s tehnološkim stručnjacima radi općeg dobra u skladu je s pozivom na dijalog vjere i znanosti te korištenje tehnologije za dobrobit čovječanstva.
magisterium.enrichment: Tehnološke inovacije trebaju biti smještene unutar šireg projekta koji traži opće dobro i služi ljudskom dostojanstvu.

citations.document_title: Message of the Holy Father for the Paris Summit on AI [10-11 February 2025] (7 February 2025)
To Participants in the Plenary Assembly of the Pontifical Academy for Life (25 February 2019)

magisterium.assessment_en: Cooperation with technological experts for the common good is in accordance with the call for dialogue between faith and science and the use of technology for the benefit of humanity.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Technological innovations should be situated within a broader project that seeks the common good and serves human dignity.

sections.subtitle_en: Viral success and the help of Sam Altman
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about the unexpected virality of Magisterium AI and the intervention of Sam Altman.
sections.content_en: After the initial quiet launch for private testing with about six hundred documents (including catechisms, compendiums, and encyclicals), Magisterium AI unexpectedly went viral. An interview with Matthew for EDPTN led to massive traffic that crashed the system, because all rate limits of the used LLM (ChatGPT) were exceeded. Matthew was forced to turn to Sam Altman, the CEO of OpenAI, for help. Altman responded quickly and helped them to restart the system. Matthew points out that without Altman's intervention, Magisterium AI might not exist today, given the limitations in computing resources and API speed at that time. This event emphasized the need for robust solutions and a careful approach to the development of Catholic AI.

sections.subtitle: Fidelitet nasuprot angažmanu: Razlike Magisterium AI-ja i drugih LLM-ova
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava ključne razlike u ciljevima Magisterium AI-ja i općih LLM-ova.
sections.content: Matthew detaljno objašnjava ključne razlike između Magisterium AI-ja i drugih velikih jezičnih modela (LLM-ova) poput ChatGPT-a, Gemini-ja ili Claude-a. Dok opći LLM-ovi optimiziraju za angažman korisnika i generiranje prihoda, što često može dovesti do 'ljutnje' (generiranja odgovora koje korisnik želi čuti) ili halucinacija, Magisterium AI ima primarni cilj 'vjernost' (fidelitet) crkvenom učenju. To znači da se ne fokusira na puko ponavljanje sadržaja, već na pružanje točnih, izvornim dokumentima potkrijepljenih odgovora. Matthew naglašava da opći LLM-ovi, iako mogu dobro predstavljati crkveno učenje, nisu savršeni i skloni su halucinacijama, posebno kod manje poznatih doktrina ili dugih razgovora. Magisterium AI, s druge strane, koristi specijalizirane alate i kontekstualne informacije kako bi osigurao točnost i relevantnost, čak i za složene dokumente poput Božanskog časoslova ili dnevnih čitanja.

magisterium.assessment: Prioritiziranje vjernosti Učiteljstvu nad pukim angažmanom izravno odražava katoličku obvezu svjedočenja istine i izbjegavanja zabluda.
magisterium.enrichment: Vjernost crkvenom Učiteljstvu je vrlina koja osigurava da vjernici ne budu prevareni ljudskom mudrošću. Teologija zahtijeva aktivno i razborito primanje svjedočanstava apostolske tradicije.

citations.document_title: To the students of the Pontifical Scots College, 4 March 1978 - Speech
Theology Today: Perspectives, Principles and Criteria

magisterium.assessment_en: Prioritizing faithfulness to the Magisterium over mere engagement directly reflects the Catholic obligation of witnessing the truth and avoiding errors.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Fidelity to the Church Magisterium is a virtue which ensures that the faithful are not deceived by human wisdom. Theology requires active and prudent reception of the testimonies of apostolic tradition.

sections.subtitle_en: Fidelity versus engagement: Differences between Magisterium AI and other LLMs
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the key differences in the goals of Magisterium AI and general LLMs.
sections.content_en: Matthew explains in detail the key differences between Magisterium AI and other large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT, Gemini, or Claude. While general LLMs optimize for user engagement and revenue generation, which can often lead to 'anger' (generating answers that the user wants to hear) or hallucinations, Magisterium AI has the primary goal of 'fidelity' (fidelitet) to Church teaching. This means that it does not focus on mere repetition of content, but on providing accurate answers supported by original documents. Matthew emphasizes that general LLMs, although they can represent Church teaching well, are not perfect and are prone to hallucinations, especially with less known doctrines or long conversations. Magisterium AI, on the other hand, uses specialized tools and contextual information to ensure accuracy and relevance, even for complex documents like the Divine Office or daily readings.

sections.subtitle: AI kao personalizirani tutor: Vizija katoličkog obrazovanja
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o potencijalu AI-ja kao personaliziranog tutora u katoličkom obrazovanju.
sections.content: Matthew izražava optimizam u pogledu uloge AI-ja u katoličkom obrazovanju, videći ga kao potencijalnog personaliziranog tutora. Smatra da će AI omogućiti ljudima da rade mnogo više nego prije, pružajući im odgovore na duboka filozofska i teološka pitanja koja su nekada zahtijevala opsežno istraživanje u knjižnicama ili savjetovanje sa svećenicima. Vizija je da učenik može komunicirati s AI-jem putem glasa, a AI će mu, na temelju nastavnog plana, pružiti personalizirano podučavanje, prilagođavajući svoj pedagoški stil. Ova personalizacija je posebno važna u kontekstu vjeronauka, gdje nastavnici često rade s velikim grupama učenika različitih potreba. AI bi mogao demokratizirati pristup kvalitetnom katoličkom obrazovanju, posebno u regijama gdje je pristup nastavnicima ili katehetama ograničen.

magisterium.assessment: Personalizirana edukacija i demokratizacija pristupa vjeronauku podržavaju misiju Crkve u prenošenju 'baštine Crkve' svim ljudima.
concerns: Potrebno je osigurati da AI dopunjuje, a ne zamjenjuje ljudsku prosudbu i pastoralnu pratnju.
magisterium.enrichment: Tehnologija treba služiti ljudskoj osobi i doprinositi pravednijem društvenom poretku. U poučavanju doktrine uvijek treba naglašavati vjernost Učiteljstvu.

citations.document_title: AI Principles and Priorities Letter (June 9, 2025) (United States Conference of Catholic Bishops (USCCB))
Veritatis gaudium

magisterium.assessment_en: Personalized education and democratization of access to religious education support the mission of the Church in transmitting the 'heritage of the Church' to all people.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Technology should serve the human person and contribute to a more just social order. In the teaching of doctrine, fidelity to the Magisterium should always be emphasized.
concerns_en: It is necessary to ensure that AI complements, and does not replace, human judgment and pastoral accompaniment.

sections.subtitle_en: AI as a personalized tutor: Vision of Catholic education
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about the potential of AI as a personalized tutor in Catholic education.
sections.content_en: Matthew expresses optimism regarding the role of AI in Catholic education, seeing it as a potential personalized tutor. He considers that AI will enable people to do much more than before, providing them with answers to deep philosophical and theological questions that once required extensive research in libraries or consultation with priests. The vision is that a student can communicate with AI via voice, and AI will, based on the curriculum, provide him with personalized teaching, adapting its pedagogical style. This personalization is especially important in the context of religious education, where teachers often work with large groups of students with different needs. AI could democratize access to quality Catholic education, especially in regions where access to teachers or catechists is limited.

sections.subtitle: Proširenje baze znanja: Od dogme do akademskih savjeta
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava kako se proširuje baza znanja Magisterium AI-ja, od osnovne dogme do akademskih savjeta.
sections.content: Proširenje katoličke baze znanja ključan je projekt za Magisterium AI. U početku su se fokusirali na primarnu doktrinu i osnovne dogme. Proces proširenja odvija se na dva načina: savjetovanjem s akademicima koji identificiraju najvažnije dokumente i slušanjem korisnika. Analiziraju se pitanja korisnika i učinkovitost AI odgovora kako bi se identificirale praznine u bazi znanja. Ako nedostaju izvori za određena pitanja, prioritizira se njihova digitalizacija i dodavanje u sustav. Matthew ističe da se baza znanja, koja je započela sa 600 dokumenata, proširila na gotovo 28.000 djela, uključujući djela crkvenih otaca, naučitelja Crkve i papinske dokumente. Svako dodavanje novih podataka poboljšava sposobnost AI-ja da pruži sveobuhvatnije i nijansiranije odgovore, nudeći različite perspektive i povijesne kontekste.

magisterium.assessment: Širenje baze znanja na oce, naučitelje i papinske dokumente osigurava cjelovitost i autentičnost katoličkog nauka.
magisterium.enrichment: Vjernost apostolskoj tradiciji uključuje proučavanje Svetog pisma, liturgije te spisa otaca i naučitelja Crkve. Crkva interpretira Riječ Božju kroz djela kreativne vjernosti Objavi.

citations.document_title: Theology Today: Perspectives, Principles and Criteria
Jesus Christ, Son of God, Savior: 1700th Anniversary of the Ecumenical Council of Nicaea (325-2025)

magisterium.assessment_en: Expanding the knowledge base to the fathers, doctors, and papal documents ensures the integrity and authenticity of Catholic teaching.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Fidelity to apostolic tradition includes the study of Holy Scripture, liturgy and the writings of the fathers and doctors of the Church. The Church interprets the Word of God through works of creative fidelity to Revelation.

sections.subtitle_en: Expansion of the knowledge base: From dogma to academic advice
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains how Magisterium AI's knowledge base is expanded, from basic dogma to academic advice.
sections.content_en: The expansion of the Catholic knowledge base is a key project for Magisterium AI. In the beginning, they focused on primary doctrine and basic dogmas. The expansion process takes place in two ways: by consulting with academics who identify the most important documents and by listening to users. User questions and the effectiveness of AI responses are analyzed in order to identify gaps in the knowledge base. If sources for certain questions are missing, their digitalization and addition to the system are prioritized. Matthew points out that the knowledge base, which started with 600 documents, has expanded to nearly 28,000 works, including works of the Church Fathers, Doctors of the Church, and papal documents. Every addition of new data improves the AI's ability to provide more comprehensive and nuanced answers, offering different perspectives and historical contexts.

iterations.theme_en: The origin and technical development of Magisterium AI: From vision to the struggle with hallucinations

iterations.theme: Utjecaj, budućnost i šira uloga Magisterium AI-ja u Crkvi i društvu

sections.subtitle: Iznenađujući uvidi: 'Dugi rep' korisničkih pitanja i personalizirani duhovni izazovi
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava koncept 'dugog repa' u korisničkim upitima i kako se Magisterium AI prilagođava osobnim pitanjima.
sections.content: Matthew ističe da su početna očekivanja tima Magisterium AI-ja o vrsti pitanja koja će korisnici postavljati bila značajno drugačija od stvarnosti. Iako su očekivali upite o temeljnoj doktrini, korisnici su se okrenuli postavljanju vrlo osobnih pitanja, fenomena koji se u industriji naziva 'dugi rep'. Ova pitanja često su uključivala specifične životne situacije i tražila su crkveno stajalište. Matthew priznaje da su rani modeli imali poteškoća s generalizacijom crkvenog učenja na tako specifične kontekste. Shvativši da će korisnici, ako Magisterium AI ne pruži odgovore, potražiti pomoć od sekularnih velikih jezičnih modela (LLM) poput ChatGPT-a, tim je odlučio prilagoditi svoj pristup. Rješenje je pronađeno u digitalizaciji papinskih propovijedi i općih audijencija, koje pružaju bogat izvor primjera kako se crkveno učenje primjenjuje na konkretne situacije. Matthew posebno ističe kateheze Benedikta XVI. kao izvanredne primjere objašnjavanja složenih dokumenata široj publici.

magisterium.assessment: Digitalizacija propovijedi i kateheza za rješavanje osobnih pitanja pomaže u primjeni univerzalnog nauka na konkretne životne situacije.
concerns: AI interpretacije moraju ostati pod nadzorom živog Učiteljstva kako bi se izbjegla subjektivna iskrivljenja.
magisterium.enrichment: Kršćani su pozvani transformirati digitalni prostor u kulturu susreta koja odražava milosrđe i zajedništvo. Obveza vjernosti nije pasivna poslušnost, već aktivno prisvajanje nauka.

citations.document_title: A Pastoral Reflection on Engagement with Social Media
Jesus Christ, Son of God, Savior: 1700th Anniversary of the Ecumenical Council of Nicaea (325-2025)

magisterium.assessment_en: Digitalization of sermons and catecheses for addressing personal questions helps in the application of universal teaching to concrete life situations.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Christians are called to transform the digital space into a culture of encounter which reflects mercy and communion. The obligation of fidelity is not passive obedience, but an active appropriation of teaching.
concerns_en: AI interpretations must remain under the supervision of the living Magisterium in order to avoid subjective distortions.

sections.subtitle_en: Surprising insights: The 'long tail' of user questions and personalized spiritual challenges
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the concept of the 'long tail' in user queries and how Magisterium AI adapts to personal questions.
sections.content_en: Matthew points out that the initial expectations of the Magisterium AI team about the type of questions that users would ask were significantly different from reality. Although they expected inquiries about fundamental doctrine, users turned to asking very personal questions, a phenomenon called the 'long tail' in the industry. These questions often included specific life situations and sought the Church's position. Matthew admits that early models had difficulties with generalizing Church teaching to such specific contexts. Realizing that users, if Magisterium AI does not provide answers, would seek help from secular large language models (LLM) like ChatGPT, the team decided to adapt its approach. The solution was found in the digitization of papal homilies and general audiences, which provide a rich source of examples of how Church teaching is applied to concrete situations. Matthew especially highlights the catecheses of Benedict XVI as extraordinary examples of explaining complex documents to a wider audience.

sections.subtitle: Tehnologija u službi duhovnosti: Prilagodba praksi modernom životu
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o tome kako tehnologija može olakšati duhovne prakse u svakodnevnom životu.
sections.content: Matthew se osvrće na svoje iskustvo iz sjemeništa, gdje je duhovni život bio duboko integriran u svakodnevicu. Međutim, u sekularnom svijetu, održavanje takvog ritma može biti izazovno. Primjećuje da tehnologija nudi rješenja za ovu dilemu, omogućujući vjernicima da pristupe duhovnim resursima u pokretu – primjerice, moleći Liturgiju časova u taksiju između sastanaka. Magisterium AI, slušajući potrebe korisnika, planira uvesti značajke koje nadilaze puki chatbot. To uključuje dnevna čitanja, uobičajene molitve i, što je najvažnije, personalizaciju. Matthew objašnjava da će aplikacija, razumijevajući interakcije i pitanja korisnika, moći ponuditi prilagođene duhovne uvide i molitve, pomažući im da prodube svoj duhovni život na putu prema svetosti. Ova personalizacija, temeljena na crkvenom učenju, ima za cilj učiniti duhovni rast dostupnijim i relevantnijim za svakog pojedinca.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak ispravno prepoznaje AI kao alat koji može olakšati pristup duhovnim resursima i promicati rast u svetosti kroz vjernost crkvenom nauku.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva naglašava da AI može pomoći ljudima u pristupu 'nizu resursa za generiranje većeg znanja o istini' sadržanih u filozofskim i teološkim djelima. Tehnologija treba služiti cjelovitom razvoju ljudske osobe i njezinu odnosu s Bogom.

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage correctly recognizes AI as a tool that can facilitate access to spiritual resources and promote growth in holiness through faithfulness to church teaching.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church emphasizes that AI can help people in accessing 'a range of resources for generating greater knowledge of the truth' contained in philosophical and theological works. Technology should serve the integral development of the human person and its relationship with God.

sections.subtitle_en: Technology in the service of spirituality: Adaptation of practices to modern life
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about how technology can facilitate spiritual practices in everyday life.
sections.content_en: Matthew reflects on his experience from the seminary, where spiritual life was deeply integrated into everyday life. However, in the secular world, maintaining such a rhythm can be challenging. He notices that technology offers solutions for this dilemma, enabling the faithful to access spiritual resources on the go – for example, praying the Liturgy of the Hours in a taxi between meetings. Magisterium AI, listening to the needs of users, plans to introduce features that go beyond a mere chatbot. This includes daily readings, common prayers and, most importantly, personalization. Matthew explains that the application, by understanding the interactions and questions of users, will be able to offer tailored spiritual insights and prayers, helping them to deepen their spiritual life on the path toward holiness. This personalization, based on Church teaching, aims to make spiritual growth more accessible and relevant for every individual.

sections.subtitle: Globalni uvidi: Regionalne razlike u duhovnim pitanjima
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew analizira kako se pitanja korisnika Magisterium AI-ja razlikuju između Zapada i Istoka.
sections.content: Analizirajući anonimne korisničke upite, Matthew je primijetio fascinantne regionalne razlike u duhovnim brigama vjernika. Na Zapadu, posebno u Sjedinjenim Američkim Državama, prevladavaju pitanja o 'skrupuloznosti' – detaljnim moralnim dilemama o smrtnim i lakim grijesima. Također, vrlo su česta pitanja o seksualnoj etici, što Matthew tumači kao odraz hipersekularizirane kulture i želje vjernika da svoje odnose žive vjerno crkvenom učenju. S druge strane, na Istoku su pitanja više usmjerena na objave, svece i pobožne prakse. Ove razlike pružaju dragocjene uvide u specifične duhovne izazove i prioritete različitih regija, pomažući timu Magisterium AI-ja da bolje prilagodi svoju bazu znanja i funkcionalnosti.

magisterium.assessment: Analiza regionalnih razlika odražava stvarne pastoralne izazove, poput skrupuloznosti i etičkih pitanja na Zapadu nasuprot pučkoj pobožnosti na Istoku.
magisterium.enrichment: Katekizam ističe da se moralna odgovornost mora procjenjivati uzimajući u obzir društvene čimbenike i tjeskobu. Crkva prepoznaje potrebu za pastoralnim odgovorima koji uvažavaju lokalne kontekste.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
La Inteligencia Artificial: Una mirada pastoral desde America Latina y el Caribe

magisterium.assessment_en: The analysis of regional differences reflects real pastoral challenges, such as scrupulosity and ethical questions in the West versus popular piety in the East.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Catechism emphasizes that moral responsibility must be assessed taking into account social factors and anxiety. The Church recognizes the need for pastoral responses that respect local contexts.

sections.subtitle_en: Global insights: Regional differences in spiritual matters
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew analyzes how the questions of Magisterium AI users differ between the West and the East.
sections.content_en: Analyzing anonymous user queries, Matthew noticed fascinating regional differences in the spiritual concerns of the faithful. In the West, especially in the United States, questions about 'scrupulosity' prevail – detailed moral dilemmas about mortal and venial sins. Also, questions about sexual ethics are very frequent, which Matthew interprets as a reflection of a hyper-secularized culture and the desire of the faithful to live their relationships faithfully to church teaching. On the other hand, in the East, questions are more focused on revelations, saints, and devotional practices. These differences provide valuable insights into the specific spiritual challenges and priorities of different regions, helping the Magisterium AI team to better adapt its knowledge base and functionalities.

sections.subtitle: Popunjavanje praznina: Primjer Reikija i suradnja s biskupskim konferencijama
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava kako se praznine u bazi znanja popunjavaju, koristeći Reiki kao primjer.
sections.content: Matthew ilustrira proces popunjavanja praznina u bazi znanja Magisterium AI-ja na primjeru upita o Reikiju. Kada je korisnik postavio pitanje o ovoj praksi, odgovor AI-ja bio je nejasan, što je ukazalo na nedostatak relevantnih informacija. Tim je tada proveo istraživanje i dodao dokumente koji objašnjavaju crkveno stajalište o Reikiju, ističući zašto je ta praksa sumnjiva. Ovaj proces je ključan za osiguravanje točnosti i relevantnosti. Matthew također naglašava suradnju s biskupskim konferencijama diljem svijeta. Cilj je identificirati dokumente i duhovni kontekst specifičan za pojedine regije, kako bi korisnici dobili odgovore koji nisu samo univerzalno relevantni, već i prilagođeni lokalnim običajima i naglascima doktrine. To osigurava da Magisterium AI pruža sveobuhvatne i kontekstualno osjetljive odgovore.

magisterium.assessment: Aktivno ispravljanje nejasnoća o Reikiju u skladu je s jasnim osudama te prakse kao nespojive s kršćanskom vjerom i znanstvenim dokazima.
magisterium.enrichment: Reiki se smatra neprikladnim za katoličke institucije jer se temelji na praznovjerju i monističkom pogledu na svijet koji niječe razliku između Boga i stvorenja. Odgovornost je onih koji poučavaju u ime Crkve ukloniti takvo neznanje.

magisterium.assessment_en: Active correction of ambiguities about Reiki is in accordance with clear condemnations of that practice as incompatible with the Christian faith and scientific evidence.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Reiki is considered inappropriate for Catholic institutions because it is based on superstition and a monistic worldview which denies the difference between God and creation. It is the responsibility of those who teach in the name of the Church to remove such ignorance.

sections.subtitle_en: Filling the gaps: The example of Reiki and cooperation with episcopal conferences
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains how gaps in the knowledge base are filled, using Reiki as an example.
sections.content_en: Matthew illustrates the process of filling gaps in the knowledge base of Magisterium AI using the example of an inquiry about Reiki. When a user asked a question about this practice, the AI's response was unclear, which indicated a lack of relevant information. The team then conducted research and added documents that explain the Church's position on Reiki, highlighting why that practice is suspicious. This process is crucial for ensuring accuracy and relevance. Matthew also emphasizes cooperation with episcopal conferences throughout the world. The goal is to identify documents and spiritual context specific to individual regions, so that users receive answers that are not only universally relevant, but also adapted to local customs and emphases of doctrine. This ensures that Magisterium AI provides comprehensive and contextually sensitive answers.

sections.subtitle: Budućnost Magisterium AI-ja: Kontinuirano poboljšanje i širenje znanja
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o budućim planovima za Magisterium AI, uključujući evaluacije i širenje baze znanja.
sections.content: Matthew iznosi planove za budućnost Magisterium AI-ja, fokusirajući se na kontinuirano poboljšanje i ekspanziju baze znanja. Jedan od ključnih alata su 'evaluacije' – opsežne liste pitanja i odgovora, djelomično generirane od strane korisnika. Kroz njih se testira kako model odgovara i koliko vjerno predstavlja crkveno učenje. Kada se otkriju nedostaci, tim radi na njihovom otklanjanju, često zamjenjujući temeljne modele novijima i sposobnijima. Matthew je posebno uzbuđen zbog napretka u razmišljanju LLM-ova, što im omogućuje bolju generalizaciju crkvenog učenja na životne situacije. Drugi glavni fokus je širenje baze znanja, što je ključno za treniranje vlastitih modela, poput 'Ephraima', prvog katoličkog jezičnog modela na svijetu. Za učinkovito treniranje potrebna je sve veća količina podataka, što vodi do sljedećeg velikog projekta.

magisterium.assessment: Razvoj vlastitih modela i testiranje vjernosti osigurava da tehnologija ostane pod ljudskom kontrolom i vjerna pologu vjere.
magisterium.enrichment: Papa Leo XIV naglašava da ljudska inteligencija, savjest i sloboda moraju voditi tehničke inovacije i određivati njihove granice. Nužno je osigurati prostor za ljudsku kontrolu nad izborima AI programa radi očuvanja ljudskog dostojanstva.

magisterium.assessment_en: The development of own models and testing of faithfulness ensures that technology remains under human control and faithful to the deposit of faith.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Pope Leo XIV emphasizes that human intelligence, conscience, and freedom must lead technical innovations and determine their limits. It is necessary to ensure space for human control over the choices of AI programs for the sake of preserving human dignity.

sections.subtitle_en: The Future of Magisterium AI: Continuous Improvement and Expansion of Knowledge
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about future plans for Magisterium AI, including evaluations and expansion of the knowledge base.
sections.content_en: Matthew presents plans for the future of Magisterium AI, focusing on continuous improvement and expansion of the knowledge base. One of the key tools are 'evaluations' – extensive lists of questions and answers, partially generated by users. Through them, it is tested how the model responds and how faithfully it represents Church teaching. When deficiencies are discovered, the team works on their elimination, often replacing the base models with newer and more capable ones. Matthew is particularly excited about the progress in the reasoning of LLMs, which enables them to better generalize Church teaching to life situations. The second main focus is the expansion of the knowledge base, which is key for training their own models, like 'Ephraim', the first Catholic language model in the world. For effective training, an ever-increasing amount of data is needed, which leads to the next big project.

sections.subtitle: Alexandrian Digital Center: Robotizirana digitalizacija i globalna dostupnost katoličke baštine
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje rad Alexandrian Digital Centra i robotske skenere za digitalizaciju knjiga.
sections.content: Matthew s velikim entuzijazmom govori o Alexandrian Digital Centru u Rimu, projektu nastalom u suradnji s Pontifikalnim Gregorijanskim Sveučilištem. Centar je posvećen ubrzanoj digitalizaciji katoličke baštine, koristeći robotske skenere koji automatski okreću stranice i skeniraju knjige. Cilj je digitalizirati djela crkvenih otaca, crkvenih naučitelja, te papinske spise, uključujući i one starije od stotinu godina, koji su trenutno nedostupni široj javnosti. Matthew ističe da će, nakon skeniranja i obrade pomoću alata poput Vulgate AI-ja, sav taj sadržaj biti dostupan globalno, na bilo kojem uređaju i na materinjem jeziku korisnika. Ova inicijativa ima ogroman evangelizacijski potencijal, pretvarajući Magisterium AI u 'majstora apologeta' s pristupom cjelokupnom pisanom crkvenom znanju. Također će značajno unaprijediti akademsko istraživanje, otkrivajući djela koja su dosad bila nepoznata istraživačima.

magisterium.assessment: Digitalizacija i globalna dostupnost crkvene baštine na materinjim jezicima snažno podupiru poslanje Crkve u digitalnom dobu.
concerns: Potreba za osiguranjem točnosti prijevoda i očuvanjem integriteta izvornih tekstova pri masovnoj digitalizaciji.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva poziva na proglašenje Radosne vijesti u digitalnim okruženjima, prepoznajući digitalni svijet kao prostor za evangelizaciju.

citations.document_title: A Pastoral Reflection on Engagement with Social Media

magisterium.assessment_en: Digitization and global accessibility of church heritage in native languages strongly support the mission of the Church in the digital age.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church calls for the proclamation of the Good News in digital environments, recognizing the digital world as a space for evangelization.
concerns_en: The need for ensuring translation accuracy and preserving the integrity of original texts during mass digitization.

sections.subtitle_en: Alexandrian Digital Center: Robotized digitization and global accessibility of Catholic heritage
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes the work of the Alexandrian Digital Centar and robotic scanners for the digitization of books.
sections.content_en: Matthew speaks with great enthusiasm about the Alexandrian Digital Centar in Rim, a project created in collaboration with the Pontifikalno Gregorijansko Sveučilište. The Centar is dedicated to the accelerated digitalization of Catholic heritage, using robotic scanners that automatically turn pages and scan books. The goal is to digitalize the works of the Church Fathers, Doctors of the Church, and papal writings, including those older than a hundred years, which are currently unavailable to the general public. Matthew emphasizes that, after scanning and processing using tools like Vulgate AI, all that content will be available globally, on any device and in the user's native language. This initiative has enormous evangelization potential, turning Magisterium AI into a 'master apologist' with access to the entire written Church knowledge. It will also significantly improve academic research, revealing works that have so far been unknown to researchers.

sections.subtitle: SaintChat: Razgovor sa svecima za dublje duhovno iskustvo
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew predstavlja novu značajku SaintChat koja omogućuje korisnicima 'razgovor' sa svecima.
sections.content: Matthew najavljuje nadolazeću značajku nazvanu 'SaintChat', koja će korisnicima omogućiti izravnu interakciju sa svecima. Iako koncept 'razgovora sa svecima' nije nov, Matthew vjeruje da je Magisterium AI jedinstveno pozicioniran da to učini autentično i korisno. To se postiže digitalizacijom ne samo kolektivnih djela svetaca, već i svih papinskih refleksija, biografskih informacija i razmišljanja drugih svetaca o njima. Kombiniranjem njihovih spisa s kontekstom njihovih života, osobnosti i trajnog nasljeđa, AI može stvoriti uvjerljivu simulaciju razgovora sa svecem. Matthew naglašava da je ključ u pružanju bogatog konteksta kako bi interakcija bila zaista autentična i duhovno obogaćujuća. Među svecima s kojima će biti moguće razgovarati su crkveni naučitelji poput Katarine Sijenske, Terezije Avilske, Tome Akvinskog i Augustina, kao i poznati pape poput Benedikta XVI. i Ivana Pavla II.

magisterium.assessment: Interakcija sa svecima putem AI-ja može produbiti poznavanje njihova nauka, ali zahtijeva jasnu distinkciju između simulacije i stvarne duhovne prisutnosti.
concerns: Rizik od antropomorfizacije AI-ja i zamjene autentičnog molitvenog zagovora svetaca tehnološkom simulacijom.
magisterium.enrichment: Kateheza treba pomoći ljudima da susretnu Isusa Krista, a digitalni alati moraju služiti tom osobnom susretu, a ne postati sami sebi svrhom.

citations.document_title: To the Bishops of Lithuania in their ad Limina Visit (September 17, 1999) - Speech

magisterium.assessment_en: Interaction with saints via AI can deepen the knowledge of their teaching, but requires a clear distinction between simulation and real spiritual presence.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Catechesis should help people to encounter Jesus Christ, and digital tools must serve that personal encounter, and not become an end in themselves.
concerns_en: The risk of anthropomorphization of AI and the replacement of the authentic prayer intercession of saints with a technological simulation.

sections.subtitle_en: SaintChat: Conversation with saints for a deeper spiritual experience
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew presents the new SaintChat feature which enables users to 'talk' with saints.
sections.content_en: Matthew announces an upcoming feature named 'SaintChat', which will allow users direct interaction with saints. Although the concept of 'conversing with saints' is not new, Matthew believes that Magisterium AI is uniquely positioned to do this authentically and usefully. This is achieved by digitizing not only the collective works of the saints, but also all papal reflections, biographical information, and the thoughts of other saints about them. By combining their writings with the context of their lives, personalities, and lasting legacy, AI can create a convincing simulation of a conversation with a saint. Matthew emphasizes that the key is in providing a rich context so that the interaction would be truly authentic and spiritually enriching. Among the saints with whom it will be possible to converse are Doctors of the Church like Katarina Sijenska, Terezija Avilska, Toma Akvinski, and Augustin, as well as famous popes like Benedikt XVI. and Ivan Pavao II.

sections.subtitle: Inovativna 'Rasprava svetaca': Novi uvidi kroz dijalog
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava naprednu značajku 'Rasprava svetaca' unutar SaintChata.
sections.content: Kao naprednu značajku SaintChata, Matthew najavljuje 'način rasprave' (debate mode), koji će omogućiti korisnicima da 'suprotstave' dva sveca u dijalogu o određenoj temi. Ideja je da se kroz interakciju različitih perspektiva svetaca, poput Edith Stein i Katarine Sijenske koje raspravljaju o važnosti rada, mogu generirati novi i zanimljivi uvidi. Matthew vjeruje da će ova funkcionalnost omogućiti dublje razumijevanje crkvenog učenja i duhovnih tema kroz dinamičnu razmjenu ideja, pružajući korisnicima jedinstveno iskustvo koje nadilazi pasivno čitanje.

magisterium.assessment: Dijaloški format između svetaca odražava bogatu tradiciju teoloških rasprava (disputatio) i može pružiti nove perspektive na suvremena pitanja.
concerns: Mogućnost generiranja anakronih ili doktrinarno netočnih zaključaka koji ne odražavaju stvarni 'sensus fidei' svetaca.
magisterium.enrichment: Povijesna metoda 'quaestio' i 'disputatio' u dominikanskoj tradiciji pokazuje kako sučeljavanje različitih argumenata služi preciznijem definiranju istine.

citations.document_title: Proposing the Christian Vision of Marriage: What Can the Dominican Tradition Teach Us?

magisterium.assessment_en: The dialogic format between saints reflects a rich tradition of theological debates (disputatio) and can provide new perspectives on contemporary questions.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The historical method 'quaestio' and 'disputatio' in the Dominican tradition shows how the confrontation of different arguments serves the more precise defining of truth.
concerns_en: The possibility of generating anachronistic or doctrinally incorrect conclusions which do not reflect the actual 'sensus fidei' of the saints.

sections.subtitle_en: Innovative 'Discussion of Saints': New insights through dialogue
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the advanced feature 'Discussion of Saints' within SaintChat.
sections.content_en: As an advanced feature of SaintChat, Matthew announces 'debate mode' (debate mode), which will allow users to 'oppose' two saints in a dialogue about a specific topic. The idea is that through the interaction of different perspectives of saints, such as Edith Stein and Katarina Sijenska who discuss the importance of work, new and interesting insights can be generated. Matthew believes that this functionality will enable a deeper understanding of Church teaching and spiritual topics through a dynamic exchange of ideas, providing users with a unique experience that goes beyond passive reading.

sections.subtitle: Nadolazeće značajke: Glasovni i obrazovni način rada za sveobuhvatno iskustvo
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o budućim značajkama Magisterium AI-ja, uključujući glasovni i obrazovni način rada.
sections.content: Osim SaintChata, Matthew najavljuje i druge uzbudljive značajke. Uskoro će biti dostupan 'glasovni način rada', omogućujući korisnicima prirodnu glasovnu interakciju s Magisterium AI-jem, slično kao i s drugim vodećim AI aplikacijama. Posebno je značajan 'obrazovni način rada', dizajniran za katoličko obrazovanje. Ovaj način rada pomoći će nastavnicima u razvoju kurikuluma i pružiti personalizirano učenje studentima. Matthew objašnjava da će AI, umjesto da daje izravne odgovore, voditi studente kroz pitanja i pomoći im da sami dođu do zaključaka, prilagođavajući svoj pedagoški stil. Ova značajka je ključna jer mnogi studenti već koriste sekularne AI alate, a Magisterium AI nudi vjernu alternativu koja je usklađena s katoličkim učenjem.

magisterium.assessment: Sokratski pristup u obrazovanju potiče aktivno sudjelovanje i kritičko razmišljanje, što je u potpunom skladu s katoličkom pedagogijom.
concerns: Osiguranje da AI vodi studenta prema objektivnom nauku Magisterija, a ne prema subjektivnim ili pogrešnim zaključcima.
magisterium.enrichment: Aktivni stil poučavanja potiče unutarnju aktivnost vjere i u skladu je s pedagogijom koja promiče aktivan odgovor na Božje darove.

citations.document_title: General Catechetical Directory

magisterium.assessment_en: The Socratic approach in education encourages active participation and critical thinking, which is in complete alignment with Catholic pedagogy.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The active style of teaching encourages the internal activity of faith and is in accordance with the pedagogy that promotes an active response to God's gifts.
concerns_en: Ensuring that AI leads the student towards the objective teaching of the Magisterium, and not towards subjective or erroneous conclusions.

sections.subtitle_en: Upcoming features: Voice and educational mode for a comprehensive experience
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about future features of Magisterium AI, including voice and educational modes.
sections.content_en: Besides SaintChat, Matthew announces other exciting features. Soon 'voice mode' will be available, allowing users natural voice interaction with Magisterium AI, similar to other leading AI applications. Especially significant is 'educational mode', designed for Catholic education. This mode will help teachers in curriculum development and provide personalized learning to students. Matthew explains that the AI, instead of giving direct answers, will lead students through questions and help them reach conclusions themselves, adapting its pedagogical style. This feature is crucial because many students already use secular AI tools, and Magisterium AI offers a faithful alternative that is aligned with Catholic teaching.

sections.subtitle: Vjernost iznad svega: Zašto je Magisterium AI ključan za katoličke studente
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava važnost vjernosti Magisterium AI-ja u usporedbi sa sekularnim LLM-ovima za katoličke studente.
sections.content: Matthew naglašava kritičnu važnost 'vjernosti' Magisterium AI-ja, posebno za katoličke studente. Dok sekularni LLM-ovi mogu pružiti odgovore koji zvuče uvjerljivo, često su ispunjeni pogreškama ili dovode u zabludu, zahtijevajući od korisnika opsežnu provjeru izvora. Matthew ističe da je to posebno problematično kada se radi o crkvenom učenju, jer korisnik mora sam procijeniti vjerodostojnost web stranica. Magisterium AI rješava ovaj problem osiguravajući da su svi njegovi izvori vjerodostojni – bilo da se radi o magisterijalnim dokumentima, djelima crkvenih otaca i naučitelja, ili teološkim časopisima pontifikalnih sveučilišta (poput Comunia, koju su osnovali Joseph Ratzinger i Ansan Boltzars). To studentima štedi vrijeme i osigurava da dobivaju točne i pouzdane informacije, bez rizika od 'halucinacija' ili 'ljutnje' (tendencije AI-ja da govori ono što korisnik želi čuti) koje su češće kod sekularnih modela.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak snažno promiče katoličku vrlinu istinoljubivosti i važnost oslanjanja na autentično Učiteljstvo u digitalnom dobu.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva je 'stup i uporište istine' s pravom da objavljuje moralna načela (Katekizam Katoličke Crkve, 2032). Vjernici su po svojoj naravi i dostojanstvu obvezni tražiti istinu, osobito religioznu, te je prigrliti (Dignitatis Humanae, 2; KKC, 2467).
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage strongly promotes the Catholic virtue of truthfulness and the importance of relying on the authentic Magisterium in the digital age.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church is the 'pillar and bulwark of the truth' with the right to announce moral principles (Catechism of the Catholic Church, 2032). The faithful are by their nature and dignity bound to seek the truth, especially religious, and to embrace it (Dignitatis Humanae, 2; CCC, 2467).

sections.subtitle_en: Faithfulness above all: Why Magisterium AI is crucial for Catholic students
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the importance of the fidelity of Magisterium AI in comparison with secular LLMs for Catholic students.
sections.content_en: Matthew emphasizes the critical importance of the 'faithfulness' of Magisterium AI, especially for Catholic students. While secular LLMs can provide answers that sound convincing, they are often filled with errors or are misleading, requiring the user to perform extensive source verification. Matthew points out that this is particularly problematic when it comes to Church teaching, because the user must evaluate the credibility of websites themselves. Magisterium AI solves this problem by ensuring that all its sources are credible – whether they are magisterial documents, works of the Church Fathers and Doctors, or theological journals of pontifical universities (such as Communio, which was founded by Joseph Ratzinger and Ansan Boltzars). This saves students time and ensures that they receive accurate and reliable information, without the risk of 'hallucinations' or 'anger' (the tendency of AI to say what the user wants to hear) which are more common in secular models.

sections.subtitle: Globalni, ponizni i otporni: Tim iza Magisterium AI-ja
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje tim koji stoji iza Magisterium AI-ja, ističući njihovu globalnu prirodu i predanost.
sections.content: Matthew opisuje tim Magisterium AI-ja kao mali, ali globalno rasprostranjen, s članovima u Africi, Sjevernoj Americi i Europi. Ova globalna prisutnost omogućuje im da budu u kontaktu s lokalnim korisnicima i razumiju specifične regionalne potrebe, što je ključno za razvoj proizvoda. Matthew ističe poniznost i strpljenje kao ključne osobine tima, posebno s obzirom na eksperimentalnu prirodu njihovog rada. Naglašava i njihovu iznimnu otpornost, prisjećajući se ranih dana kada su članovi tima, uključujući i one iz marketinga, ručno kopirali i lijepili tekstove kako bi proširili bazu znanja. Ova predanost, čak i izvan njihovih primarnih zadataka, bila je ključna za prevladavanje početnih izazova i osiguravanje da Magisterium AI pruža točne i pouzdane informacije.

magisterium.assessment: Opis tima odražava kršćanske vrijednosti poniznosti i ustrajnosti u radu za opće dobro.
magisterium.enrichment: Ljudska kreativnost i talenti dar su od Boga koji se trebaju koristiti za služenje drugima (Laudato Si', 131). Poniznost i strpljenje u 'mukotrpnom' radu odražavaju poziv na odgovorno sudjelovanje u Božjem stvaralačkom djelovanju.
magisterium.assessment_en: The team description reflects Christian values of humility and perseverance in work for the common good.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Human creativity and talents are a gift from God which should be used for serving others (Laudato Si', 131). Humility and patience in 'painstaking' work reflect the call to responsible participation in God's creative action.

sections.subtitle_en: Global, humble, and resilient: The team behind Magisterium AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes the team that stands behind Magisterium AI, highlighting their global nature and commitment.
sections.content_en: Matthew describes the Magisterium AI team as small but globally distributed, with members in Africa, North America, and Europe. This global presence allows them to be in contact with local users and understand specific regional needs, which is crucial for product development. Matthew highlights humility and patience as key traits of the team, especially considering the experimental nature of their work. He also emphasizes their exceptional resilience, recalling the early days when team members, including those from marketing, manually copied and pasted texts to expand the knowledge base. This dedication, even beyond their primary tasks, was key to overcoming initial challenges and ensuring that Magisterium AI provides accurate and reliable information.

sections.subtitle: Odgovornost i točnost: Temeljni izazovi u predstavljanju crkvenog učenja
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o velikoj odgovornosti i izazovima u osiguravanju točnosti crkvenog učenja u AI-ju.
sections.content: Matthew naglašava ogromnu odgovornost koju osjeća tim Magisterium AI-ja u predstavljanju crkvenog učenja. Ova odgovornost zahtijeva iznimnu pažnju i oprez, zbog čega se tim kreće sporije od nekih drugih AI tvrtki. Prioritet je izbjegavanje 'halucinacija' i zabluda korisnika, što bi moglo imati ozbiljne posljedice. Matthew ističe da su razvili rigorozne 'evaluacijske skupove' za kontinuirano testiranje točnosti modela. Također, spremni su uložiti značajan trud u digitalizaciju potrebnih djela, čak i ako je to zamoran proces, kako bi osigurali da su odgovori uvijek ispravni. Ova predanost točnosti i vjernosti crkvenom nauku ključna je za povjerenje korisnika i integritet platforme.

magisterium.assessment: Naglasak na odgovornosti i točnosti izravno je usklađen s crkvenom zabranom krivog prikazivanja istine.
magisterium.enrichment: Istinoljubivost je vrlina koja se sastoji u tome da se čovjek pokazuje istinitim u svojim djelima i riječima (KKC, 2468). Osjećaj 'goleme odgovornosti' u prenošenju učenja Crkve odjekuje dužnošću pastira i teologa pod vodstvom Duha Svetoga.
magisterium.assessment_en: The emphasis on responsibility and accuracy is directly aligned with the church's prohibition of misrepresenting the truth.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Truthfulness is a virtue which consists in this, that a man shows himself true in his deeds and words (CCC, 2468). The sense of 'immense responsibility' in transmitting the teaching of the Church echoes the duty of pastors and theologians under the guidance of the Holy Spirit.

sections.subtitle_en: Responsibility and accuracy: Fundamental challenges in presenting Church teaching
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about the great responsibility and challenges in ensuring the accuracy of Church teaching in AI.
sections.content_en: Matthew emphasizes the enormous responsibility that the Magisterium AI team feels in presenting Church teaching. This responsibility requires exceptional attention and caution, which is why the team moves slower than some other AI companies. The priority is avoiding 'hallucinations' and misleading users, which could have serious consequences. Matthew points out that they have developed rigorous 'evaluation sets' for continuous testing of the model's accuracy. Also, they are ready to invest significant effort into the digitalization of necessary works, even if it is a tedious process, in order to ensure that the answers are always correct. This commitment to accuracy and fidelity to Church teaching is key for user trust and the integrity of the platform.

sections.subtitle: Crkva i AI: Znatiželja, prihvaćanje i poziv na evangelizaciju
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje reakciju Crkve na Magisterium AI, ističući znatiželju i prihvaćanje tehnologije kao alata.
sections.content: Matthew je iznenađen pozitivnom i znatiželjnom reakcijom Crkve na Magisterium AI. Iako je očekivao otpor, biskupi su pokazali veliku otvorenost i želju za razumijevanjem tehnologije kao alata. Uspoređivali su je s tiskarskim strojem, prepoznajući njezin potencijal za evangelizaciju i dosezanje 'periferija', posebno u kontekstu nedostatka svećenika i katehista. Matthew ističe da su biskupi, koji su i sami prošli kroz opsežno studiranje, shvatili vrijednost alata koji olakšava pristup crkvenom znanju. Iako postoje opće brige o tehnologiji u društvu, prevladava stav da je AI tu da ostane i da se Crkva mora aktivno uključiti, pa čak i preuzeti vodstvo u njenom razvoju i primjeni.

magisterium.assessment: Pozitivan stav biskupa i prepoznavanje AI-ja kao alata za evangelizaciju u skladu je s koncilskim naukom o medijima.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva prihvaća i promiče tehnološka otkrića koja otvaraju nove putove za priopćavanje evanđeoske poruke (Inter Mirifica, 1). Digitalno okruženje treba postati prostor za misiju, dosežući 'digitalne periferije' (Sinoda o sinodalnosti 2024, 113).
magisterium.assessment_en: The positive attitude of the bishops and the recognition of AI as a tool for evangelization is in accordance with conciliar teaching on media.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church accepts and promotes technological discoveries which open new paths for communicating the Gospel message (Inter Mirifica, 1). The digital environment should become a space for mission, reaching 'digital peripheries' (Sinoda o sinodalnosti 2024, 113).

sections.subtitle_en: The Church and AI: Curiosity, acceptance, and a call to evangelization
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes the reaction of the Church to Magisterium AI, highlighting curiosity and the acceptance of technology as a tool.
sections.content_en: Matthew is surprised by the positive and curious reaction of the Church to Magisterium AI. Although he expected resistance, the bishops showed great openness and a desire for understanding the technology as a tool. They compared it with the printing press, recognizing its potential for evangelization and reaching the 'peripheries', especially in the context of the shortage of priests and catechists. Matthew points out that the bishops, who themselves went through extensive studying, understood the value of a tool that facilitates access to church knowledge. Although there are general concerns about technology in society, the prevailing attitude is that AI is here to stay and that the Church must actively involve itself, and even take leadership in its development and application.

sections.subtitle: Crkva kao vodič: Oblikovanje budućnosti AI-ja za ljudsko cvjetanje
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o širem utjecaju AI-ja na društvo i jedinstvenoj ulozi Crkve u vođenju tog procesa.
sections.content: Matthew razmatra širi utjecaj umjetne inteligencije na društvo, uspoređujući ga s industrijskom revolucijom i naglašavajući da će AI preoblikovati ljudsku civilizaciju na dosad neviđen način. Vjeruje da Crkva ima jedinstvenu ulogu u vođenju ovog prijelaza, ne samo reaktivnim rješavanjem etičkih problema, već proaktivnim definiranjem vizije za budućnost. Matthew se nada da će papa, kao augustinac, usmjeriti pažnju na temeljna pitanja ljudskog stanja i cilja, umjesto da se isključivo bavi reakcijama na tehnološke inovacije. Crkva, kao vodeći stručnjak za ljudsko stanje, trebala bi pomoći u razumijevanju kako izgleda 'grad Božji' u kontekstu AI-ja i robota, te kako tehnologija može služiti ljudskom cvjetanju. Ova vizija, vjeruje Matthew, omogućit će razvoj etičkih okvira i propisa koji su usklađeni s pozitivnom budućnošću.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak izvrsno artikulira ulogu Crkve kao proaktivnog vizionara koji usmjerava tehnologiju prema općem dobru i ljudskom dostojanstvu.
concerns: Potrebno je osigurati da se 'grad Božji' ne svede na puki tehnološki utopizam, već da ostane usidren u eshatološkoj nadi.
magisterium.enrichment: Papa Leo XIV naglašava da AI mora služiti zajedničkom dobru, a ne samo akumulaciji moći, pozivajući na temeljno pitanje: 'Što znači biti čovjek u ovom trenutku povijesti?'. Crkva vidi tehnologiju kao znak ljudske usmjerenosti prema budućnosti i Bogu.

citations.document_title: To Participants in the Conference "Artificial Intelligence and Care for Our Common Home" (5 December 2025)
Pope Francis Attends the G7 Session on Artificial Intelligence (13-15 June 2024)

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage excellently articulates the role of the Church as a proactive visionary that directs technology toward the common good and human dignity.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Pope Leo XIV emphasizes that AI must serve the common good, and not only the accumulation of power, calling for the fundamental question: 'What does it mean to be human at this moment in history?'. The Church sees technology as a sign of human orientation toward the future and God.
concerns_en: It is necessary to ensure that the 'city of God' is not reduced to mere technological utopianism, but that it remains anchored in eschatological hope.

sections.subtitle_en: The Church as a guide: Shaping the future of AI for human flourishing
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about the broader influence of AI on society and the unique role of the Church in leading that process.
sections.content_en: Matthew considers the broader impact of artificial intelligence on society, comparing it with the industrial revolution and emphasizing that AI will reshape human civilization in a way unseen until now. He believes that the Church has a unique role in leading this transition, not only by reactively solving ethical problems, but by proactively defining a vision for the future. Matthew hopes that the pope, as an Augustinian, will direct attention to the fundamental questions of the human condition and goal, instead of exclusively dealing with reactions to technological innovations. The Church, as a leading expert on the human condition, should help in understanding what the 'city of God' looks like in the context of AI and robots, and how technology can serve human flourishing. This vision, Matthew believes, will enable the development of ethical frameworks and regulations that are aligned with a positive future.

sections.subtitle: Crkva kao stručnjak za ljudsko stanje: Vizija budućnosti s AI-jem
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew zaključuje razgovor ističući ulogu Crkve kao stručnjaka za ljudsko stanje u oblikovanju budućnosti s AI-jem.
sections.content: Matthew zaključuje naglašavajući da je Crkva, s tisućljećima kontinuiranog proučavanja ljudskog stanja, vodeći stručnjak u tom području. Poziva Crkvu da artikulira jasnu viziju buduće civilizacije koja prioritizira ljudsko cvjetanje, definirajući pravilan odnos između ljudi, umjetne inteligencije i robota. Matthew citira kardinala Collinsa: 'Ako znate kamo idete, vjerojatno ćemo stići.' Vjeruje da ako Crkva može pomoći u definiranju tog cilja, tada se mogu razviti etički okviri i propisi koji su usklađeni s tom vizijom. Takav proaktivan pristup omogućio bi optimističan pogled na budućnost, gdje tehnologija služi dobrobiti čovječanstva. Matthew se nada da će papa, posebno kao augustinac, posvetiti više vremena oblikovanju ove vizije nego samo reagiranju na tehnološke promjene.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak ispravno prepoznaje Crkvu kao stručnjaka za ljudsko stanje koji postavlja etičke okvire temeljene na antropološkoj viziji.
concerns: Važno je naglasiti da AI, unatoč autonomiji, ostaje alat (sui generis) i ne smije zamijeniti ljudsko odlučivanje.
magisterium.enrichment: Etičko razlučivanje mora uključiti glasove siromašnih i marginaliziranih kako bi se izbjegla 'kultura odbacivanja'. Dokument 'Antiqua et Nova' ističe da je inteligencija dar Božji koji treba koristiti za odgovorno upravljanje stvorenim svijetom.

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage correctly recognizes the Church as an expert on the human condition which sets ethical frameworks based on an anthropological vision.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Ethical discernment must include the voices of the poor and marginalized in order to avoid the 'throwaway culture'. The document 'Antiqua et Nova' emphasizes that intelligence is a gift of God which should be used for responsible stewardship of the created world.
concerns_en: It is important to emphasize that AI, despite autonomy, remains a tool (sui generis) and must not replace human decision-making.

sections.subtitle_en: The Church as an Expert on the Human Condition: A Vision of the Future with AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew concludes the conversation by highlighting the role of the Church as an expert on the human condition in shaping the future with AI.
sections.content_en: Matthew concludes by emphasizing that the Church, with millennia of continuous study of the human condition, is the leading expert in that field. He calls the Church to articulate a clear vision of a future civilization that prioritizes human flourishing, defining the proper relationship between humans, artificial intelligence, and robots. Matthew quotes Cardinal Collins: 'If you know where you are going, we will probably arrive.' He believes that if the Church can help in defining that goal, then ethical frameworks and regulations can be developed that are aligned with that vision. Such a proactive approach would enable an optimistic view of the future, where technology serves the well-being of humanity. Matthew hopes that the Pope, especially as an Augustinian, will devote more time to shaping this vision than just reacting to technological changes.
